title: Desanitization Configuration
description: Configuration file for database desanitization operations. This file demonstrates all available configuration options with recommended defaults.

security._comment: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for desanitization operations - Story 7.1
security._description: Controls who can perform desanitization operations based on database role membership
security._enabled_comment: Set to true to require role membership for desanitization. Default: false (backward compatible)
security._enabled_example: When enabled, users must be members of at least one 'allowed_roles' to perform desanitization
security._allowed_roles_comment: List of database roles permitted to perform desanitization operations
security._allowed_roles_builtin: Built-in roles: db_owner, db_datawriter, db_datareader, db_ddladmin
security._allowed_roles_custom: Custom roles: Create with 'CREATE ROLE DataRestorer'; Grant with: EXEC sp_addrolemember 'DataRestorer', 'DOMAIN\username'
security._allowed_roles_example: User must be member of ANY role in list (OR logic, not AND)
security._require_role_for_dry_run_comment: If true, requires role membership even for dry-run/preview operations. Default: false
security._require_role_for_dry_run_use_case: Set to false to allow read-only users to preview desanitization without committing
security._deny_on_role_check_failure_comment: If role validation fails (e.g., DB error), deny access. Default: true (fail-safe)
security._deny_on_role_check_failure_security: Recommended: true for production (security over availability)
